findings: Verified identity: adult Green Heron (Butorides virescens), family Ardeidae.

All visible plate text matches the verified measurements, behavior, habitat, and adult/juvenile field marks. The candidate’s chestnut neck and breast, dark crested crown, deep green-blue back, dark rounded wings, long straight bill, orange-yellow legs, and short tail agree with the supplied photos and sources.
The primary full-body illustration has one head, one beak, two wings, two legs, and one tail; the separate head and wing are clearly labeled anatomical studies, not extra anatomy on the bird.
No place name, ZIP code, coordinates, map, or local-observation detail appears on the plate.
No material species, anatomy, composition, or text errors found.

verification_sources.title: Green Heron Identification — All About Birds, Cornell Lab of Ornithology
